overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic corporate interior from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit corridors, a luxurious lobby with red lounge seating, a security desk with holographic monitors, and a dramatic multi-level atrium with red and cyan ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit corporate corridor transitioning to lobby

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open lobby area with red lounge seating

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark futuristic corridor with cyan neon overhead lighting, approaching an open lobby space

entered.detail: long cyan fluorescent light strips running along the ceiling
dark metallic corridor walls with vertical paneling
transparent glass safety railing with metal frame
modern curved sofas with red upholstery arranged in seating areas
illuminated artificial tree with white blossoms in a black planter

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, dark corporate corridor illuminated by cyan neon ceiling strips. The camera moves forward through the hallway, passing dark metal walls and glass railings, before transitioning into a more open lobby area where red lounge couches and a decorative illuminated tree become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: executive lobby with lounge seating and digital art installations

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious lobby, passing between red couches and approaching a security checkpoint area

entered.detail: tall structural column covered in small square digital lights displaying patterns
illuminated wall signage with the text SECURE YOUR SOUL
large white number 2 indicating floor level on the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the executive lobby, passing the red lounge seating and decorative tree. A large digital pillar with illuminated squares becomes prominent on the right, while signage reading SECURE YOUR SOUL appears on the left wall as the approach to the security desk begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with holographic monitoring station

events.description: approaches security desk and pans across the holographic monitor displays

agents.ego_description: approaching the security desk and examining the holographic monitors displaying data graphs and security feeds

entered.detail: large curved reception desk with dark surface and integrated lighting
floating transparent display showing audio waveform graphs and data
holographic screen displaying security camera feeds and system data
black ergonomic office chair positioned at the security desk

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the security checkpoint, focusing on a curved desk with multiple holographic monitors displaying data waveforms and security information. The camera pans across the desk surface, showing office chairs and detailed monitor displays, while the lobby seating area disappears from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level atrium overlook with vertical gardens

events.description: moves from security desk to overlook edge, revealing lower atrium levels

agents.ego_description: standing at the railing overlooking the multi-level atrium, observing the vertical architecture and holographic displays

entered.detail: view down to lower floors of the building with red ambient lighting and structural columns
stacked balcony levels with glass railings and illuminated signage for floors 2, 3, and 4
large floating holographic screen displaying colorful imagery on the upper left balcony
transparent elevator shaft with visible lift car and structural framework

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the security desk, the camera approaches the edge of the level and reveals a dramatic view of the multi-level atrium below, bathed in red ambient light. The camera pans upward to show stacked floors with holographic advertisements and glass elevator shafts, emphasizing the vertical scale of the corporate architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit corridor into a vast, multi-level corporate atrium. It begins by gliding through a narrow hallway defined by dark metal walls and cyan ceiling strips before opening into a luxurious lobby featuring red lounge seating and a decorative illuminated tree. As the camera advances, it passes a digital pillar and corporate signage on the walls, shifting its focus toward a curved security desk equipped with glowing holographic monitors and data waveforms. The scene then moves away from the checkpoint to reach the edge of the floor, revealing a dramatic plunge into a red-lit atrium. Finally, the camera pans upward to capture the immense vertical scale of the architecture, showcasing stacked floors, glass elevator shafts, and towering holographic advertisements.
